tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]
You must be a special lady  (snapping fingers all intro)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]
(Billy, you singin' first tenor or second?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]
Naw, Harry, I'm singin' second man)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]
And a very exciting girl[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]
(Now bring that bass out, man[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]
Hey man, I'll bring it out a little bit more)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]
You gotta be a special lady[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]
(Let's get down on some harmony, come on!)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]
'Cause you got me sittin' on top of the world[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]                   [ch]E[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
Sittin' on top of the world[/tab]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]             [ch]C#m7[/ch]                 [ch]A7[/ch]
Somehow I knew     it would be you[/tab]
[tab][ch]A7[/ch]                  [ch]Bm7[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
To change my gray skies to blue[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]C#m7[/ch]                    [ch]A7[/ch]
And it was strange when you called my name[/tab]
[tab][ch]A7[/ch]                            [ch]Bm7[/ch]            [ch]E7[/ch]
Ever since that day I haven't been the same, ooh[/tab]


[Pre-chorus]
[tab][ch]C#m7[/ch]                 [ch]F#m7[/ch]               [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Before I met you, my sun didn't want to shine[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]           [ch]C#m7[/ch]            [ch]F#m7[/ch]         [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Then all of a sudden you slipped up from behind[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m7[/ch]               [ch]F#m7[/ch]   [ch]Bm7[/ch]   [ch]E7[/ch]
Pop (Pop) went the reason in my mind[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]E7[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]                 [ch]C#m7[/ch]   [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]E7[/ch]
You must be a special lady[/tab]
[tab][ch]E7[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]C#m7[/ch]          [ch]Bm7[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]
And a very exciting girl (Ooh, so exciting)[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]C#m7[/ch]         [ch]Bm7[/ch]   [ch]E7[/ch]
You gotta be a special lady (What a lady)[/tab]
[tab][ch]E7[/ch]                [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
'Cause you got me sittin' on top of the world[/tab]
[tab][ch]Esus4[/ch]                [ch]Esus4[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
Sittin' on top of the worllllld[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                [ch]C#m7[/ch]               [ch]A7[/ch]
I was like a song     so out of key[/tab]
[tab][ch]A7[/ch]                               [ch]Bm7[/ch]  [ch]E7[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
Then you came and gave my soul a meloody[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]              [ch]C#m7[/ch]                      [ch]A7[/ch]
Thanks to you, for pullin' me through[/tab]
[tab][ch]A7[/ch]                         [ch]Bm7[/ch]
I've always lost but now I win with you[/tab]


[Pre-chorus]
[tab][ch]C#m7[/ch]                 [ch]F#m7[/ch]               [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Before I met you, my sun didn't want to shine[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]           [ch]C#m7[/ch]            [ch]F#m7[/ch]         [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Then all of a sudden you slipped up from behind[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m7[/ch]               [ch]F#m7[/ch]   [ch]Bm7[/ch]   [ch]E7[/ch]
Pop (Pop) went the reason in my mind[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]E7[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]                 [ch]C#m7[/ch]   [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]E7[/ch]
You must be a special lady[/tab]
[tab][ch]E7[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]C#m7[/ch]        [ch]Bm7[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]
And a very exciting girl   (so exciting)[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]C#m7[/ch]   [ch]Bm7[/ch]   [ch]E7[/ch]
You gotta be a special lady[/tab]
[tab][ch]E7[/ch]                [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
'Cause you got me sittin' on top of the world (ohhh)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Esus4[/ch]                [ch]Esus4[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
Sittin' on top of the worllllld[/tab]


[Interlude]
[ch]A[/ch] [ch]C#m7[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]E7[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]C#m7[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]C#m7[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Sittin' on top of the worllllld[/tab]
[tab][ch]Esus4[/ch]
Sittin' on top of the worllllld[/tab]


[Pre-chorus]
[tab][ch]C#m7[/ch]                 [ch]F#m7[/ch]               [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Before I met you, my sun didn't want to shine[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]           [ch]C#m7[/ch]            [ch]F#m7[/ch]         [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Then all of a sudden you slipped up from behind[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m7[/ch]               [ch]F#m7[/ch]   [ch]Bm7[/ch]   [ch]E7[/ch]
Pop (Pop) went the reason in my mind[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]A[/ch]                 [ch]C#m7[/ch]    [ch]Bm7[/ch]  [ch]E7[/ch]
(You must be a special lady)[/tab]
[tab][ch]E7[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]C#m7[/ch]      [ch]Bm7[/ch]     [ch]E7[/ch]
(And a very exciting girl) so exciting[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]C#m7[/ch]   [ch]Bm7[/ch]  [ch]E7[/ch]
(You gotta be a special lady)[/tab]
[tab][ch]E7[/ch]                 [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
('Cause you got me sittin' on top of the world)[/tab]
[tab][ch]E7[/ch]
Sittin' on top of the world[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]                 [ch]C#m7[/ch]                 [ch]Bm7[/ch]  [ch]E7[/ch]
You must be a special lady (you're a lady)[/tab]
[tab][ch]E7[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]C#m7[/ch]   [ch]Bm7[/ch]
And a very exciting girl (hmmmm you're a lady)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]
You gotta be a special lady (get down Billy Brown) all right[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]
'Cause you got me sittin' on top of the world[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]
You must be a special lady (woo)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]
And a very exciting girl (oh girl)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]
You gotta be a special lady...fade out[/tab]
